coastal-flood.title: Coastal flooding hits the waterfront
coastal-flood.body: Floodwaters have breached drainage limits, displacing thousands of residents near the coast. The city needs a response before the damage spreads inland.

mitigations.label: Your flood defense investment limits the damage

oil-spill.title: Oil spill reported in downstream corridors
oil-spill.body: A pipeline rupture has contaminated waterways and sparked community anger. Immediate decisions will determine how far the damage spreads.

mitigations.label: Your environmental monitoring contained the spill faster

federal-grant.title: Federal capital allocation arrives
federal-grant.body: Abuja has approved a discretionary development grant for the city. How you direct it will signal your priorities to citizens and investors.

choices.label: Direct into economic and jobs programs

mitigations.label: High public confidence unlocked a supplemental allocation

community-protest.title: Street protests erupt over service failure
community-protest.body: Residents have blocked major roads after weeks of unaddressed infrastructure neglect. The city is watching how leadership responds.

choices.label: Negotiate directly and make concrete commitments
Launch an inquiry and promise follow-up

mitigations.label: Your standing trust reserve moderated the protest scale
Deep distrust has amplified the unrest beyond expectations

investment-wave.title: Private investors signal major interest
investment-wave.body: A cluster of firms in logistics, services, and light manufacturing are considering committing capital. The terms you negotiate now will define the deal.

choices.label: Pledge infrastructure improvements to attract them
Negotiate local employment and equity quotas

mitigations.label: Your economic track record attracts a larger investor pool

rent-strike.title: Tenants across the city refuse rent payments
rent-strike.body: Overcrowding and unaffordable housing have pushed residents to organize a widespread rent strike. Landlords are demanding government action.

mitigations.label: Prior housing investment limits the strike's reach

dry-season.title: Prolonged dry season strains water supply
dry-season.body: Reservoir levels have dropped critically. Urban agriculture, industry, and household supply are all under pressure from the shortfall.

choices.label: Water trucking program for critical zones

mitigations.label: Your water infrastructure investment reduces the crisis severity

market-boom.title: Informal sector trade surges unexpectedly
market-boom.body: A wave of commercial activity is flowing through the city's informal markets. The city must decide how to engage before momentum peaks.

choices.label: Tax and formalise for public revenue
Let it run freely without intervention

mitigations.label: Your economic foundations amplify the boom's benefits

migration-surge.title: Population influx strains city capacity
migration-surge.body: Economic pressure elsewhere is pushing people into the city faster than infrastructure can absorb them. Housing, transport, and services are feeling the squeeze.

choices.label: Welcome with settlement and integration support
Manage entry and limit informal settlement

mitigations.label: Strong housing capacity absorbs the surge with less strain
A strong job market turns migrants into economic contributors
